theme.description: A modern evolution of the legacy Biofood dashboard. Clean, high-trust, dense, and accessible. Uses deep cobalt/slate navy for structure and crisp white for content, meeting the user's request for a 'modern evolution' of their blue/white UI.

layout.spacing_scale: Tailwind defaults, emphasizing generous padding (p-6) inside cards to prevent text collision with borders.
layout.grid_system: Control Room Grid (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4) with gap-4 or gap-6. Dense data utility.
layout.sidebar: Dark mode left sidebar (w-64, bg-slate-900) with lighter nested secondary nav (bg-slate-800) if needed, off-white (bg-slate-50) main content background.
layout.cards: Flat white background, 1px border (border-slate-200), no default shadow. Hover: slight lift (-translate-y-0.5) and shadow-sm. Use rounded-xl for a modern SaaS feel.

components.buttons: Shadcn based. Primary buttons use bg-blue-600 with text-white. Fully rounded (rounded-md).
components.tables: Shadcn Table. Subtle border-b. Left-aligned data. Mono font for numbers and IDs.
components.charts: Shadcn Charts (Recharts). Line charts for balance predictions (planifications), Bar charts for package revenue. Traffic-light colored markers for allergen/risk levels.
components.alerts: Shadcn Alert or Sonner Toast for immediate bot/allergen triggers. Red/Amber borders for high-risk alerts.

motion.hover_effects: Cards subtly lift and gain shadow. Rows in tables gain faint background color (hover:bg-slate-50).
motion.page_load: Staggered fade-in for dashboard grid items.

image_urls.description: Children eating healthy school lunch - for empty alert feed background or onboarding

accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text meets APCA guidelines. White text on primary blue has >4.5:1 contrast. Muted text must not go lighter than slate-500 on white.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST use data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='sidebar-nav-alerts', data-testid='kpi-card-revenue').

icons: lucide-react (default) with standard 20px sizes for sidebar, 16px for inline text.
instructions_to_main_agent: Install and use 'Work Sans' for headings and 'IBM Plex Sans' for body text from Google Fonts.
Implement a deep blue (bg-slate-900) left sidebar matching the legacy Biofood identity but modernized into a 2026 SaaS aesthetic.
Use Shadcn UI extensively for the Data Grid, Cards, and Tables. Do not build complex interactive components from scratch.
Use the Control Room Grid pattern for the main dashboard layout (tight gaps, high density, 100% height utilization for cards).
Integrate the provided avatars for the Activity Feed and User Profile.
Ensure all buttons, form inputs, and interactive charts have 'data-testid' tags. This is CRITICAL.
